intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS read, context), read nested AGENTS before entering folders, used canonical cast records as authoritative source for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Using today from context (2026-03-31), birthday data in canonical cast records shows Claudia Reiter has birthday 1981-04-25, which is the nearest upcoming month-day. A follow-up search for 04-25 in cast found only claudia.md, so no tie exists.
